Kadir Has University

Theatre

Kadir Has University Department of Theatre offers a 4-year undergraduate programme integrating the fields of acting, voice, movement and theory. The Linklater voice technique, supported by techniques such as Stanislavski and Meisner, aims to develop the creative potential of students. The department offers a comprehensive experience to its students through workshops and projects enriched by domestic and international collaborations. Graduates have the opportunity to pursue careers in acting, directing, dramaturgy and stage management.
